createBotDescription: Fill in the information below to add a new bot to the panel.

logoutDialog.title: Log out of your account?
logoutDialog.description: Your current session will end and you will need to enter your password again to sign in.

editor.title: Custom theme
editor.description: Adjust the core panel colors without touching status accents or plugin-specific success colors.

surface.title: Surface
surface.description: These colors define the page background, cards, popovers, and the main readable text.

brand.title: Brand
brand.description: These colors control the main accent, active buttons, focus rings, and highlighted actions.

ui.title: Interface
ui.description: Tune supporting blocks, muted text, borders, form inputs, and secondary surfaces.

scrollbar.title: Scrollbars
scrollbar.description: Fine-tune scrollbar thumb and button colors to keep the panel consistent.

preview.title: Live preview
preview.description: Changes are applied instantly while custom theme mode is active.
preview.cardDescription: A quick look at how your main UI tokens work together.

baseTheme.title: Base mode
baseTheme.description: Choose whether custom theme should inherit light or dark structural styles. Use the presets below if you want to replace the whole palette.

note.title: What changes here
note.description: This editor affects the main panel palette: background, cards, buttons, borders, inputs, muted blocks, and scrollbars. Feature-specific colors like installed plugin green stay untouched.

picker.title: Color picker
picker.description: Use quick swatches or fine-tune the color with HSL sliders.

popoverForeground.label: Popup text
popoverForeground.description: Readable text inside dropdowns and popovers.

primary.label: Primary accent
primary.description: Main brand button and selected state.

accent.label: Accent surface
accent.description: Hover states and highlighted UI zones.

input.label: Input border
input.description: Text fields, selects, and control outlines.

ring.label: Focus ring
ring.description: Keyboard focus and active input outline.

scrollbarButtonBg.label: Scrollbar button
scrollbarButtonBg.description: Arrow button background on classic scrollbars.
